DSDontWriteNetworkStores.title: Prevent .DS_Store file creation on network volumes
DSDontWriteNetworkStores.description: Prevent .DS_Store file creation when interacting with a remote file server using the Finder.

DSDontWriteUSBStores.title: Prevent .DS_Store file creation on USB volumes
DSDontWriteUSBStores.description: Prevent .DS_Store file creation when interacting with external USB drives and flash storage using the Finder.
